ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "anonymous_id" TEXT /* Anonymous ID assigned to the user for tracking */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created in the system */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* JSON array of previously visited destinations */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of user preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_views" (
  "page_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page view entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the page was viewed */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page that was viewed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the page view event */,
  "utm_source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic (e.g., Google, Facebook) */,
  "utm_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the marketing campaign (e.g., CPC, Email) */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* URL of the referring page */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., click, scroll, form submission) */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the event (e.g., form fields, scroll position) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the page view in seconds */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) during the page view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination (e.g., Paris, Bali) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the destination is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the popularity of the destination */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the destination */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the destination */,
  "featured_image" TEXT /* URL of the featured image for the destination */,
  "travel_tips" TEXT /* Travel tips for the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destination_selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination selection */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the selection was made */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected destination */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the destination was selected */,
  "selection_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the selection process in seconds */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) during the selection */,
  "selection_reason" TEXT /* Reason why the user selected the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destination_selections_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destination_selections_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utm_parameters" (
  "utm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for UTM parameters */,
  "utm_source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic (e.g., Google) */,
  "utm_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the campaign (e.g., Email) */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "utm_campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated marketing campaign */,
  "utm_content" TEXT /* Additional content information (e.g., ad group, specific ad) */,
  "utm_term" TEXT /* Search term used (if applicable) */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the UTM combination */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the UTM combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utm_parameters_utm_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("utm_campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographic regions targeted by the campaign */,
  "creative_assets" TEXT /* JSON array of creative assets used in the campaign */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object of performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users engaged */,
  "total_page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views recorded */,
  "most_selected_destination" INTEGER /* Most selected destination ID */,
  "user_segmentation" TEXT /* JSON object of user segmentation data */,
  "page_view_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object of page view distribution by page */,
  "destination_popularity" TEXT /* JSON object of destination popularity by destination */,
  "utm_performance" TEXT /* JSON object of UTM parameter performance */,
  "engagement_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object of engagement metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_most_selected_destination FOREIGN KEY ("most_selected_destination") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for engagement metrics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the metrics */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions the user has participated in */,
  "total_destinations_selected" INTEGER /* Total number of destinations the user has selected */,
  "average_session_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the user's sessions */,
  "most_visited_page" TEXT /* Most visited page by the user */,
  "top_destinations" TEXT /* JSON array of the user's top selected destinations */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score based on user activity */,
  "last_engagement" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_score" INTEGER /* Rating (1-5) given by the user */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the resolution of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification content */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., informational, promotional) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, delivered, opened) */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Admin user who sent the notification */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the preference */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., 'preferred_language') */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., 'English') */,
  "travel_style" TEXT /* User's preferred travel style (e.g., luxury, budget, adventure) */,
  "favorite_activities" TEXT /* JSON array of the user's favorite activities */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the admin account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., superadmin, manager) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of the admin user's permissions */,
  "activity_log" TEXT /* JSON array of the admin user's activity log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
